scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=@(3000,8000); foreach($p in $ports){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($c){ $ids=$c|Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach($id in $ids){ Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ('stopped PID=' + $id + ' on port ' + $p) } } }"
scripts.dev:status: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=@(3000,8000); foreach($p in $ports){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($c){ $ids=($c|Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique)-join ','; Write-Output ('port ' + $p + ' listening pid=' + $ids) } else { Write-Output ('port ' + $p + ' not listening') } }"
